event: presented to local emergency department with lower abdominal pain
large 35mm right sided pelvi-ureteric junction (PUJ) calculus
urine culture prior to procedure revealed mixed growth
intraoperative retrograde pyelogram (RPG) revealed no evidence of fistula
contrast tracking from proximal ureter to D2 portion of duodenum
urgent transfer to tertiary hospital ICU
progressed to full diet by Day 5
no abnormal collections in nephrectomy bed
